ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-31-2020 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Determining Title To Interest In Certain Trust Assets
Off Calendar Aug-31-2020 Continued To Oct-05-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Myron Greenberg appeared by telephone for and with Steven Ching (Trustee) by telephone.

The Court raised the issue of no proof of service on the intestate heirs. Mr. Greenberg asked for forgiveness stating that because of COVID nothing got done correctly, that one of the heirs was served, but One Legal did not file the proof of service, that the other two heirs were not served and that he has re-engaged One Legal to serve again. Mr. Greenberg also stated that he was asked by the Probate Examiner to serve everyone again, that his Assistant decided not to come in to the office because of COVID and that his Assistant never filed the proof of service which was served on February 14, 2020. In addition, Mr. Greenberg stated that he was told that one of the heirs is in a nursing home, spoke of the challenge of serving someone at a nursing home, stated that those people (three intestate heirs) have no interest in this case and asked if the Court could waive the notice requirement. The Court spoke of the procedure of serving and perhaps filing of a declaration regarding efforts to serve. The Petition for Order Determining Title to Interest in Certain Trust Assets is continued to October 5, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The proof of service is to be filed by September 21, 2020. The order to appear is off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not reported.

Petition For Order Determining Title To Interest In Certain Trust Assets
Off Calendar Aug-03-2020 Continued To Aug-31-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Trustee and the Attorney to appear on August 31, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why they have not responded to the Probate Examiner's notes. The Petition for Order Determining Title to Interest in Certain Trust Assets is also continued to that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.
